hindi: ह्रीं श्रीं क्लीं मेधा प्रभा जीवन ज्योति प्रचण्ड। शान्ति कान्ति जागृत प्रतिभा रक्षप्रभा अखण्ड॥
english: Om Hreem Shreem — invoking Gayatri the great light of life, unbroken protective radiance of peace and awakened talent
roman: Hreem Shreem Kleem Medha Prabha Jeevan Jyoti Prachand, Shanti Kanti Jagrit Pratibha Rakshaprabha Akhand

hindi: जय जय जय गायत्री माता। सत्य सनातन सुखदाता॥
english: Victory to Mother Gayatri; truth, eternal, giver of happiness
roman: Jai Jai Jai Gayatri Mata, Satya Sanatan Sukh Data

hindi: ऋग्वेद की ऋचा पावन। मन पवित्र मेधा भावन॥
english: The sacred verse of the Rigveda; purifying the mind and nurturing intelligence
roman: Rigved Ki Richa Pavan, Man Pavitra Medha Bhavan

hindi: चतुर्वेद जननी गायत्री। ब्रह्माणी, रुद्राणी, सावित्री॥
english: Mother of four Vedas, Gayatri; Brahm's power, Rudra's power, Savitri
roman: Chaturved Janani Gayatri, Brahmani Rudrani Savitri

hindi: सूर्य मंडल में तेज तुम्हारा। जप से होता मन उजियारा॥
english: Your radiance is in the solar sphere; chanting illuminates the mind
roman: Surya Mandal Mein Tej Tumhara, Jap Se Hota Man Ujiyara

hindi: गायत्री चालीसा जो गावे। ज्ञान बुद्धि का वरदान पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Gayatri Chalisa; receives the boon of knowledge and wisdom
roman: Gayatri Chalisa Jo Gaave, Gyan Buddhi Ka Vardan Paave

hindi: जय जय गायत्री माँ भवानी। वेदों की उत्पत्ति सुखदानी॥
english: Victory to Mother Gayatri Bhavani; origin of the Vedas, giver of happiness
roman: Jai Jai Gayatri Maa Bhavani, Vedon Ki Utpatti Sukhdani
